title: 7 Chakra Rice Chain Necklace – 24K Gold Tone Plated
short_description: Seven chakra-inspired beads on a sleek 24K gold tone plated rice chain — a meaningful, lightweight necklace made for everyday spiritual styling.
body_html:
Alignment | Inner Balance | Everyday Energy

Carry balance with a clean golden shine. The 7 Chakra Rice Chain Necklace brings seven chakra-inspired beads together on a sleek 24K gold tone plated rice chain — a piece that feels spiritual, stylish, and effortless to wear every single day.

The colourful beads represent energy alignment from Root to Crown — grounding, confidence, positivity, communication, clarity, and inner calm — while the polished rice-style chain keeps the look premium and understated, never heavy or loud.

Key Highlights

  • 7 Chakra Bead Design — seven smooth, round, multi-colour beads symbolising balance across all seven chakras.
  • 24K Gold Tone Plated Rice Chain — sleek rice-link pattern on a stainless steel base with a polished golden finish.
  • Meaningful Everyday Jewellery — spiritual styling with a modern golden jewellery feel.
  • Lightweight & Comfortable — easy to wear daily with casual outfits, office looks, festive wear, or meditation styling.
  • Premium Minimal Look — colourful beads add meaning; the golden chain keeps it elegant and wearable.

Why You Will Love It

  • Represents all 7 chakras in one jewellery piece
  • Supports a calm, focused, and grounded mindset
  • Adds a stylish spiritual touch to everyday outfits
  • A thoughtful gift for meditation lovers and crystal jewellery users

How To Style

Wear it as your daily spiritual essential — over plain T-shirts, shirts, kurtas, festive outfits, or meditation wear. For lasting shine, keep it away from water and perfume, and wipe gently after use.
seo_title: 7 Chakra Necklace | 24K Gold Tone Rice Chain
seo_description: 7 chakra bead necklace on a 24K gold tone plated rice chain. Lightweight spiritual jewellery for daily wear, meditation & gifting. COD available.

metafields.highlights: 7 chakra-inspired beads · 24K gold tone plated rice chain · Stainless steel base · Lightweight everyday wear · Spiritual + premium minimal look
metafields.material_or_ingredients: Stainless steel base chain with 24K gold tone plating; seven round smooth-polished multi-colour chakra-inspired beads; spring-ring clasp.
metafields.care_or_directions: Avoid water, perfume, sweat, and harsh chemicals. Wipe gently with a soft dry cloth after use and store in a dry pouch or jewellery box.
metafields.shipping: Ships in 24 hrs · COD available · Free shipping over ₹499

faqs.q: What is special about this necklace?
faqs.a: It combines seven chakra-inspired beads with a 24K gold tone plated rice chain, giving you spiritual meaning and premium everyday styling in one piece.

faqs.q: What do the 7 chakra beads represent?
faqs.a: The seven colours represent balance from Root to Crown — grounding, confidence, positivity, communication, clarity, and inner calm.
Yes. It is lightweight and comfortable, and styles easily with casual outfits, office wear, kurtas, festive looks, and meditation wear.
The chain has a 24K gold tone plated finish over a stainless steel base, giving a rich golden look at an accessible price.

faqs.q: Is it suitable for both men and women?
faqs.a: Yes. The minimal rice-chain design and chakra beads make it a unisex piece that works for everyone.

faqs.q: How do I maintain the shine?
faqs.a: Keep it away from water, perfume, sweat, and chemicals. Wipe gently after each wear and store it separately in a dry pouch or jewellery box.
